seoTitle: Currumbin vs Currumbin Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Currumbin vs Currumbin Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Currumbin and Currumbin Valley.
heading: Currumbin vs Currumbin Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Currumbin, Queensland and Currumbin Valley, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Currumbin has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Currumbin Valley (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Currumbin or Currumbin Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Currumbin has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Currumbin Valley scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Currumbin scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Currumbin Valley scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Currumbin or Currumbin Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Currumbin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
